theory.canonical_statement: ID 431 formalizes the thermodynamic cost of information processing within the left vortex channel. Every state transition in the system encodes approximately 17 bits of information. To prevent entropy accumulation from stalling the TZP extraction, the system must dissipate the Landauer cost (kB T ln 2) for every bit erased during the reset phase of the duty cycle. Thermal Dissipation: Waste heat from bit erasure is channeled to the cryogenic bath to maintain Tcritical. Bit Efficiency: The 17.23 bits per measurement (log2 (153, 600)) are managed via high density information registers.
